title: {YTP} ~ Some Screams Are At Cats
description:
I was challenged recently to do a YouTube Poop that's clean, but using a source with lots of profanity. As much as "Guy Yells at Cats" has been used in YTPs, I've never seen one with this as the main source, so I thought I'd squeeze a joke or two out of it.

Also, no PETA jokes. Sorry, Katniss.
